Thought 3: The narrative strongly suggests Taylor is the most likely murderer. Her profession directly aligns with the murder method (snake venom), and she had the opportunity as the only person confirmed to be at the chalet. Her motive (escaping abuse) is also compelling. Mack's involvement seems less direct; while he has access to snakes, his alibi of not getting out much is weak but not directly contradicted, and the narrative doesn't place him at the scene. The inconsistency in his story about reporting an assault is notable, but it doesn't directly link him to the murder. Taylor's presence at the chalet and her expertise make her the prime suspect.
